title: Ioses #2500
definition:
Joses = "exalted"

 1) one of the ancestors of Christ, \\#Lu 3:29\\
 2) Joses, the brother of Jesus, \\#Mr 6:3\\
 3) Joses, the son of Mary, the sister of the mother of Jesus, \\#Mt 27:56\\
 4) Joses, a Levite, \\#Ac 4:36\\
